across.clue: to feel very happy about something or to celebrate something in a happy way.
intended to last or perform an activity only until someone or something permanent or final is available.
an action or movement that you need care or skill to do.
Not relating to a real situation and therefore not relevant.
to make something dirty polluted or poisonous by adding a chemical waste or infection
To think about or discuss something very carefully especially before making a decision.
not based on any particular plan or done for any particular reason
to officially order someone to come to a place especially a court of law
Back up your words with action | Put your ___ where your mouth is
very valuable and impossible to replace

down.clue: a limited amount of something especially food that you are allowed to have for example when there is not much available or when someone else is controlling it.
a slight idea or small piece of information that tells you that something might exist or be happening.
the speed that something moves at in one direction.
Maintain your beliefs | Stand by/stick to your principles
to become physically different from other plants or animals of the same type as a result of a genetic change.
To think very carefully about something for a long time.
Ideas methods or people that are considered ordinary or normal and accepted by most people
to be the same as something else or very much like it
to make something bad become worse especially a situation or a medical condition
a slow and gradual change from one situation or opinion to another.
